global.title: pricing-utils provides editor-level formatting and tier price calculations
global.content:
# pricing-utils provides editor-level formatting and tier price calculations

Located at `editors/service-offering-editor/components/pricing-utils.ts`, this module provides UI-level pricing utilities.

## Key Exports

| Function | Purpose | Used By |
|----------|---------|--------|
| `formatPrice(amount, currency)` | Currency formatting with symbol | ServiceCatalog, TheMatrix, TierDefinition, TierPricingOptionsPanel |
| `calculateTierRecurringPrice(groups, cycle, tierId)` | Sum regular group monthly prices for a tier | TierDefinition |
| `calculateEffectiveSetupPrice(setupCost)` | Apply setup discount, return base/effective/savings | ServiceCatalog, ServiceGroupSetupCostPanel |
| `detectMajorityCycle(groups, currentCycle, overrides)` | Find majority billing cycle among groups | TheMatrix |
| `BILLING_CYCLE_LABELS` / `BILLING_CYCLE_SHORT_LABELS` | Human-readable cycle names | Various dropdowns |

Re-exports `BILLING_CYCLE_MONTHS` from the document model.

---

Topics:
- [[helper functions]]
global.description: Located in service-offering-editor/components — re-exports BILLING_CYCLE_MONTHS and adds formatPrice, calculateTierRecurringPrice, calculateEffectiveSetupPrice, detectMajorityCycle
